scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,WEB,APP,CLEANER,ADMIN" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgMagenta,bgYellow,bgCyan" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:app" "npm run dev:cleaner" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix quickclean-backend && npm install --prefix quickclean-web && npm install --prefix quickclean-app && npm install --prefix quickclean-cleaner && npm install --prefix quickclean-admin
